title: Vega-Lite Color Risk Knowledge Base
description: Declarative knowledge base for color-family definitions and known high-risk combinations for common color vision deficiency scenarios.

classificationModel.notes: Prototype uses broad hue/saturation/lightness heuristics for explainable family assignment.

riskyCombinations.label: Red/Green pairing
riskyCombinations.message: The visualization combines red and green families, which can be difficult to distinguish for users with common red-green color vision deficiencies.
riskyCombinations.suggestion: Use a colorblind-safe palette (e.g., blue/orange) or add shape, pattern, labels, or direct annotations.
riskyCombinations.rationale: Red-green confusions are among the most common CVD-related failures in categorical encodings.

riskyCombinations.label: Purple/Blue proximity
riskyCombinations.message: Purple and blue can become hard to separate at small sizes or low contrast.
riskyCombinations.suggestion: Increase lightness separation or add non-color encoding channels.
riskyCombinations.rationale: Blue-purple hues can cluster perceptually, especially in legends and thin marks.

riskyCombinations.label: Red/Black contrast ambiguity
riskyCombinations.message: Red and black combinations can lose category distinction in low-lightness contexts.
riskyCombinations.suggestion: Lift red lightness/chroma or replace black with a lighter neutral.
riskyCombinations.rationale: Dark reds can collapse toward black for some viewers and at small visual scales.

riskyCombinations.label: Brown/Green/Red triad
riskyCombinations.message: The brown-green-red triad can be especially ambiguous in thematic maps and stacked marks.
riskyCombinations.suggestion: Use distinct hue families plus texture or symbols for robust differentiation.
riskyCombinations.rationale: This triad combines multiple warm/earth tones often reported as hard to separate.

riskyCombinations.label: Pink/Turquoise/Gray low-salience mix
riskyCombinations.message: Pink, turquoise, and gray together may produce low-salience distinctions for some audiences.
riskyCombinations.suggestion: Increase contrast and add labels or shape channels for critical comparisons.
riskyCombinations.notes: Useful as a conservative warning in pastel-themed dashboards.

riskyCombinations.label: Green/Black dark-range pairing
riskyCombinations.message: Green paired with black can become difficult to parse when mark area is small.
riskyCombinations.suggestion: Use brighter green shades and increase line/mark thickness or add labels.
riskyCombinations.rationale: Low-lightness greens can become visually merged with dark neutrals.
